zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Adeline De Beaumont於大約1107年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾波蒙特時，她的父親Robert Beaumont62歲，母親Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois27歲。她於1120年之前與Hugh de Montfort在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1178年1月6日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年72歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Adeline De Beaumont于大约1107年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾波蒙特时，她的父亲Robert Beaumont62岁，母亲Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois27岁。她于1120年之前与Hugh de Montfort在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1178年1月6日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾享年72岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Adeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Adeline De Beaumont was born about 1107, in Beaumont, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Robert Beaumont, was 62 and her mother, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, was 27. She married Hugh de Montfort before 1120, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 6 January 1178, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Adeline De Beaumont est née environ 1107, à Beaumont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Robert Beaumont, avait 62 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh de Montfort avant 1120, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 6 janvier 1178, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Adeline De Beaumont um 1107 in Beaumont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Beaumont 62 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois 27. Sie hat vor 1120 in Leicester, Leicestershire, England Hugh de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. Januar 1178 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leicester, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Adeline De Beaumont è nata il circa 1107 nel Beaumont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Robert Beaumont, aveva 62 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Hugh de Montfort prima del 1120, nel Leicester, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 6 gennaio 1178, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Leicester, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Adeline De Beaumontが約1107年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアビーウモントで生まれた時，父Robert Beaumontは62歳，母Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandoisは27歳であった。1120年以前にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターでHugh de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1178年1月6日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで72歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Adeline De Beaumont(이)가 대략 1107년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 보몽에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Beaumont(은)는 62세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1120년 이전 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 Hugh de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1178년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Adeline De Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1107, em Beaumont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert Beaumont, tinha 62 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh de Montfort antes 1120, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1178, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Adeline De Beaumont родилась около 1107 г. в местности бомонт, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Robert Beaumont было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh de Montfort перед 1120 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 6 января 1178 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Adeline De Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1107, en Beaumont, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert Beaumont, tenía 62 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Isabelle Capet Comtesse of Vermandois, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Hugh de Montfort antes de 1120, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 6 de enero de 1178, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
